_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: Sabre Hospitality
listings.description: Sabre Hospitality provides distribution, reservation, and marketing technology for hotel chains, connecting properties to Sabre's global travel agency and GDS network alongside direct and OTA channels. It bundles CRS, digital marketing, and business intelligence tools.
usps: Trusted by major global hotel brands

listings.name: Amadeus Travel Platform
listings.description: The Amadeus Travel Platform is a comprehensive distribution and booking infrastructure connecting airlines, hotels, and travel sellers globally, spanning shopping, booking, ticketing, and servicing across the travel value chain. It underpins much of the world's travel agency and OTA booking activity.
usps: Massive airline and hotel supplier network
Deep enterprise reliability at global scale

listings.name: Travelport+
listings.description: Travelport+ is a modernized travel distribution marketplace connecting travel agencies to airline, hotel, and car rental content with rich merchandising and NDC-enabled offers. It replaces legacy GDS interfaces with a retail-style shopping experience for agents.
usps: Broad NDC adoption across airline partners

listings.name: Duffel
listings.description: Duffel provides a modern API for booking and distributing flights, hotels, and other travel content, enabling OTAs, travel management companies, and fintech platforms to embed travel booking without legacy GDS infrastructure. It emphasizes fast integration and transparent pricing.

listings.name: NDC Exchange (Accelya)
listings.description: NDC Exchange, an Accelya solution, provides aggregation of multiple airlines' NDC offers into a single connection for travel sellers and agencies, simplifying the fragmented airline-by-airline NDC integration process. It acts as connective middleware in the modern airline retailing shift.
usps: Backed by Accelya's airline industry expertise

listings.name: HBSI (Hotel Booking Solutions)
listings.description: HBSI provides hotel and travel booking distribution technology enabling agencies, corporate travel departments, and resellers to search and book hotel inventory across multiple supplier sources through a unified interface.
usps: Serves both leisure and corporate booking needs

listings.name: Jack Rabbit Systems
listings.description: Jack Rabbit Systems provides travel technology solutions including booking engines and distribution tools for tour operators and travel agencies, focused on flexible package and dynamic itinerary building for multi-supplier content.

listings.name: Booking Automation
listings.description: Booking Automation provides channel management and distribution software for vacation rental and hotel operators, syncing listings across Airbnb, Vrbo, Booking.com, and other channels through an automated rules engine.
usps: Strong automation rules engine for pricing

listings.name: Juniper Booking Engine
listings.description: Juniper's booking engine and distribution middleware connects tour operators, DMCs, and wholesalers to multiple hotel, flight, and activity suppliers, enabling dynamic packaging and B2B/B2C resale through a single technology stack.
usps: Flexible middleware for wholesalers and DMCs

listings.name: Dingus Technology
listings.description: Dingus Technology provides reservation and distribution software for tour operators and activity providers, offering booking management, inventory control, and multi-channel distribution for experience-based travel products.
usps: Focus on tours and activities distribution

listings.name: HotelHub
listings.description: HotelHub is a corporate hotel booking and distribution platform aggregating negotiated and public hotel rates for business travelers and travel management companies, aiming to consolidate fragmented corporate hotel programs into a single tool.
usps: Focus on corporate travel hotel consolidation

listings.name: HRS Group
listings.description: HRS Group is a corporate lodging platform providing hotel booking, payment, and duty-of-care technology for business travel programs, aggregating negotiated hotel rates for enterprise clients across global markets.

listings.name: Priceline Partner Solutions
listings.description: Priceline Partner Solutions offers API access to Priceline's hotel, flight, and rental car inventory for third-party businesses to embed travel booking into their own platforms, similar to sibling brand Expedia's partner solutions model.
features: Hotel, flight, and car inventory access
usps: Access to Booking Holdings' broad inventory

listings.name: TravelgateX
listings.description: TravelgateX is a hotel content distribution hub connecting suppliers, wholesalers, and resellers through a single standardized API marketplace, reducing the need for point-to-point integrations across the travel B2B ecosystem.

listings.name: W2M (World2Meet) Distribution
listings.description: W2M provides B2B travel distribution technology bundling hotel, flight, and package content for travel agencies across Spain and Latin America, operating as connective middleware between suppliers and reseller agents.
usps: Combined wholesale and DMC service model
Established agency trust in Iberian markets
